name: Unique Golf
about: Unique Golf Shop is a golf simulator venue and retail store located in West Islip, New York. It features two state-of-the-art Foresight simulators with GC Hawk and overhead Falcon units, available for rent by the hour for individuals or groups. The venue offers custom club fittings, a repair service, and a 4-lesson beginner program for $199.99. Open seven days a week, the shop also buys and sells used golf equipment for cash.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Foresight simulators with advanced tracking
Affordable club fitting services on any budget
Option to rent simulators and demo new equipment simultaneously

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or use the opportunity to demo new equipment while renting the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so BYOB is not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate is provided for a full 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as welcoming to golfers of all ages, including juniors and beginners.
